cves.name: Shellshock Bash Code Injection
cves.description: GNU Bash through 4.3 processes trailing strings after function definitions in the values of environment variables, allowing remote code execution.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade bash to >= 4.3 patch 25.

cves.name: Shellshock Bash Incomplete Fix
cves.description: GNU Bash through 4.3 bash43-025 is vulnerable to command injection because the initial Shellshock patch was incomplete.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade bash to >= 4.3 patch 26.

cves.name: Baron Samedit Sudo Heap Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in sudo before 1.9.5p2 via sudoedit -s. Any local user can escalate to root without requiring sudo privileges.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade sudo to >= 1.9.5p2.

cves.name: Sudo User ID -1 Bypass
cves.description: Sudo before 1.8.28 allows an attacker to run commands as root by specifying UID -1 or 4294967295 when the sudoers entry allows running as any user except root.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade sudo to >= 1.8.28.

cves.name: Sudo pwfeedback Stack Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in sudo before 1.8.31 when pwfeedback is enabled in /etc/sudoers. Local user can trigger the overflow to gain root privileges.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade sudo to >= 1.8.31. Disable pwfeedback in sudoers.

cves.name: PwnKit Polkit pkexec Local Privilege Escalation
cves.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability in polkit's pkexec. Out-of-bounds read in argument parsing allows any unprivileged user to gain root on default installations. Present since May 2009.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade polkit. Remove SUID bit from pkexec as workaround: chmod 0755 /usr/bin/pkexec.

cves.name: GHOST glibc gethostbyname Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in the __nss_hostname_digits_dots function in glibc 2.2-2.17. Remote code execution via crafted hostname resolution.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade glibc to >= 2.18.

cves.name: Looney Tunables glibc ld.so Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Buffer overflow in GNU C Library's dynamic loader ld.so while processing the GLIBC_TUNABLES environment variable. Allows local privilege escalation to root.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade glibc to >= 2.39 or apply vendor patches.

cves.name: glibc __vsyslog_internal Heap Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Heap buffer overflow in the __vsyslog_internal function of glibc. Allows local privilege escalation via syslog logging functions.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade glibc to >= 2.39.

cves.name: systemd Denial of Service via Long Paths
cves.description: systemd through 248 allows a local attacker to cause a denial of service (kernel panic or system hang) by creating deeply nested directory structures triggering excessive stack allocation.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade systemd to >= 249 or apply vendor patches.

cves.name: systemd less Privilege Escalation
cves.description: systemd before 247 allows local users to gain root by using the less pager when running systemctl status. LESSSECURE is not applied to the pager.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade systemd to >= 247. Set LESSSECURE=1 as workaround.

cves.name: curl SOCKS5 Heap Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Heap buffer overflow in curl's SOCKS5 proxy handshake. When the hostname is longer than 255 bytes, curl switches from local resolution to SOCKS5 proxy resolution, leading to a heap overflow.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade curl to >= 8.4.0.

cves.name: curl Cookie Injection via CURLOPT_COOKIEFILE
cves.description: Cookie injection vulnerability in libcurl. An attacker can inject cookies into a running program using a specific set of conditions.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade curl to >= 8.4.0.

cves.name: glibc iconv Buffer Overflow
cves.description: Out-of-bounds write in GNU C Library's iconv() function when converting certain character sets. Can lead to remote code execution in PHP applications using iconv.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade glibc to >= 2.40 or apply vendor patches.

cves.name: Samba vfs_fruit Out-of-Bounds Heap Read/Write
cves.description: Out-of-bounds heap read/write vulnerability in Samba's VFS module vfs_fruit. Remote code execution as root when fruit:metadata=netatalk or fruit:resource=file is set.

cves.name: CUPS cups-browsed Unauthenticated RCE
cves.description: cups-browsed binds to UDP port 631 on all interfaces and trusts any packet from any source to trigger a Get-Printer-Attributes IPP request, which can be used to execute arbitrary commands on the system when a print job is started.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade cups-browsed. Disable or restrict cups-browsed service. Block UDP 631 at firewall.

cves.name: Polkit D-Bus Authentication Bypass
cves.description: A flaw in polkit allows an unprivileged local attacker to bypass credential checks via a carefully timed D-Bus request that is terminated before polkit completes the authentication check.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade polkit to >= 0.119 or apply vendor patches.

cves.name: libexpat Integer Overflow in storeAtts
cves.description: In Expat (libexpat) before 2.4.3, an integer overflow in the storeAtts function in xmlparse.c can lead to excessive memory consumption and potential code execution.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade libexpat to >= 2.4.3.

cves.name: OpenLDAP SQL Injection via Experimental Back-sql
cves.description: SQL injection in OpenLDAP's experimental back-sql backend. Authenticated LDAP queries can inject arbitrary SQL through LDAP attributes.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade OpenLDAP to >= 2.5.13 or disable back-sql.

cves.name: Redis Debian/Ubuntu Lua Sandbox Escape
cves.description: Debian/Ubuntu-specific packaging of Redis allows Lua sandbox escape due to dynamically linked Lua library. Remote attacker with Redis access can execute arbitrary code.
cves.recommendation: Apply vendor patches. Restrict Redis access to trusted networks.

cves.name: Apache HTTP Server HTTP Request Smuggling via mod_proxy
cves.description: HTTP request smuggling vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server with mod_proxy and certain RewriteRule/ProxyPassMatch configurations. Remote attacker can bypass access controls.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade Apache HTTPD to >= 2.4.56.

cves.name: runc Container Escape
cves.description: runc through 1.0-rc6 allows attackers to overwrite the host runc binary by leveraging the ability to execute a command as root within a container. Enables container escape to host root.
cves.recommendation: Upgrade runc to >= 1.0-rc7. Upgrade Docker to >= 18.09.2.

cves.name: XZ Utils Supply Chain Backdoor
cves.description: Malicious code was discovered in the upstream xz/liblzma tarballs (versions 5.6.0 and 5.6.1). The backdoor targets OpenSSH sshd via systemd, providing unauthorized remote access.
cves.recommendation: Downgrade xz to <= 5.4.6. Upgrade to >= 5.6.2 (fixed).

cves.name: ImageTragick ImageMagick Command Injection
cves.description: Insufficient filtering of input in ImageMagick's delegate mechanism allows remote code execution when processing images with certain coders (mvg, svg, etc.).
cves.recommendation: Upgrade ImageMagick to >= 6.9.3-10 or 7.0.1-1. Apply policy.xml restrictions.
